tasks.instruction: Submit a demo inquiry through the contact form using the provided personal details, band information, referral source, and a detailed message about sending a blues demo.

expected_values.subject: Demo Inquiry
expected_values.name: Alex Blues
expected_values.message: Hi, I am an independent blues artist interested in submitting a demo to your label. I have a new 8-song live-in-studio EP that focuses on Chicago-style electric blues. Please let me know your preferred way to receive private streaming links and any specific submission guidelines you would like me to follow.
